title: maytenus fournieri subsp. drakeana
intro: Maytenus fournieri subsp. drakeana, also known as Maytenus drakeana or Maytenus korthalsii, is a plant species native to Southeast Asia, commonly used in traditional medicine. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of cancer cells and its anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Maytenus fournieri subsp. drakeana include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, as well as its ability to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to treat a range of ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
